query: Google Android 17 stable release date announcement May 2026
answer: **Note to caller:** This research is significantly limited because all web search and fetch tools were unavailable. The findings are based on pre-cutoff training knowledge and historical Android release patterns. I was unable to confirm whether Google made a specific May 2026 announcement about Android 17's stable release date. I strongly recommend re-running this research query when search tools are available, or manually checking `developer.android.com/about/versions/17` and Google I/O 2026 coverage.
key_facts: All web search tools were unavailable in this session, limiting research to pre-cutoff knowledge (through early 2025)
Android 15 was released stable in October 2024; Android 16 entered developer preview in late 2024/early 2025 with an accelerated timeline
Google shifted Android 16 to an earlier stable release (Q2 2025) rather than the traditional fall window (Aug-Oct)
Google I/O is typically held in May and is the primary venue for Android release announcements
If Google continued the accelerated timeline from Android 16, Android 17 stable could target Q2-Q3 2026
If Google reverted to the traditional schedule, Android 17 stable would be expected Q3-Q4 2026 (August-October)
No live confirmation of any specific May 2026 Android 17 announcement could be obtained
